meta.title: Apartasol 1104 Citadela DI Sole – Santa Fe de Antioquia, Colombia
meta.description: Premium vacation apartment for up to 8 guests in Santa Fe de Antioquia, Colombia. Pools, water slides, mountain views and family atmosphere. Book on Booking or Airbnb.
meta.og_description: The perfect family getaway in Santa Fe de Antioquia. Up to 8 guests, pools, water slides and mountain views.

hero.subtitle: The perfect family getaway in Santa Fe de Antioquia

apartment.heading: The Apartment
apartment.description_1: Discover Apartasol 1104 DI Sole, a vacation apartment designed for an unforgettable stay in Santa Fe de Antioquia. Located in one of the most complete vacation complexes in the area, it combines tranquility, comfort and entertainment for the whole family.
apartment.description_2: With capacity for up to 8 guests, the apartment features two air-conditioned bedrooms, three bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, balcony and comfortable social areas. From the apartment you can enjoy views of the pools and the mountains, in an ideal setting for relaxing and sharing.
apartment.description_3: DI Sole stands out for its pools, water slides, gym, sports courts, children's playground, common areas, 24-hour security and family atmosphere. It is an excellent base to enjoy the colonial charm of Santa Fe de Antioquia with the comfort of a premium vacation experience.
apartment.rules: No parties · No pets · No smoking

santafe.heading: Santa Fe de Antioquia
santafe.subtitle: A family oasis in the heart of Antioquia
santafe.description: Santa Fe de Antioquia is a municipality of great historical and cultural value in Colombia, declared a national monument. Its colonial architecture, cobbled streets, centuries-old churches and warm climate make it the perfect destination to rest, explore and enjoy with family.
santafe.activities: From walks through the colonial quarter and visits to the cathedral to boat trips on the Cauca River and outdoor adventures, Santa Fe de Antioquia offers an unforgettable experience for every age.
santafe.distances_note: Distances from Citadela DI Sole to key points of interest — details coming soon.

location.heading: Location
location.subtitle: How to get here
location.address: Citadela DI Sole, Santa Fe de Antioquia, Antioquia, Colombia
location.distances_pending: Distances to points of interest coming soon.
location.how_to_arrive_text: Santa Fe de Antioquia is about 80 km north-west of Medellín via Highway 62. By car the journey takes approximately 1.5 hours. Citadela DI Sole is located on the outskirts of the town; the exact pin is shown on the map above.
